title: BICCN_DART-FISH
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5nnef","text":"This protocol documents DART-FISH procedures used to generate spatial transcriptomic data from human brain section for BICCN.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Wash, dry and UV the silicone isolators. UV the EasyDip jars. Move away unused stuff from the bench and clean and undust the working area. Set the HybEZ oven 37C.
Prepare 75ml of 4% formaldehyde in 1x PBS. Requires two vials of 16% formaldehyde. A B 1 component volume (mL) 2 DEPC-water 52 3 16% PFA 20 4 10X PBS 8

Take the sections that are on 25mm*60mm coverslips out of -80C on dry ice, insert them into the slide holder, submerge the slide holder in the staining jar containing 4% PFA in PBS. Fix for 60mins at 4C. 01:00:00, 4C

Remove the DEPC-PSBT jar and the 4% PFA jar containing the samples from 4C. Insert the sample holder into the cold 1x PBST jar. Incubate for 3 minutes. Then insert the sample holder in the room temperature 1x PBST jar. Incubate for 3 minutes. 00:03:00, in 4C DEPC-PBST with occasional agitation 00:03:00, in RT DEPC-PBST with occasional agitation
Make sure that the padlock probes have 5' phosphate. In case they do not, run T4 PNK reaction and clean up the product using Zymo ssDNA/RNA clean up columns.

Prepare jars of 50%, 70% and two 100% ethanol. Dehydrate Section with 00:05:00, 50% EtOH at room temperature 00:05:00, 70% EtOH at room temperature 00:05:00, 100% EtOH at room temperature 00:05:00, 100% EtOH at room temperature

Take the coverslips out of the sample holder. 00:05:00, Air drying at room temperature. In the meantime, put 20mm diameter Press-To-Seal silicone isolators on a kipwipe on a flat surface. Carefully put the coverslips on silicone isolators, with the tissue sample in the hole. Gently press on the back of the coverslip to seal completely. You may want to stack a 20mm diameter isolator on top of the already mounted 20mm isolator to increase the volume.

Permeabilize sample with 0.25% Triton X-100 in DEPC-1X PBS for 00:10:00, at Room temperature 875 µL, DEPC-H2O 100 µL, 10x PBS 25 µL, 10% Triton-X 100 A B 1 component x1 volume (uL) 2 DEPC-water 875 3 10X PBS 100 4 10% Triton X-100 25
Wash thrice with DEPC-1X PBS and DEPC-Water 1 mL, DEPC-1X PBS quick wash 1 mL, DEPC-1X PBS quick wash 1 mL, DEPC-water quick wash

Prepare Reverse Transcription Mix on Ice. A B 1 component x1 volume (uL) 2 DEPC-water 90.75 3 5X SSIV buffer 30 4 10mM dNTP 3.75 5 100uM N5_dc10-Cy5_N9 3.75 6 100uM dT20_dc7-488 3.75 7 0.1M DTT 7.5 8 4mM aminoallyl-dUTP 1.5 9 RNase inhibitor (40U/uL) 1.5 10 SuperScript IV Reverse Transcriptase 7.5 11 total 150 Incubate human brain sections with the Reverse Transcription Mix 150 µL, Reverse Transcription Mix for 00:10:00 at 4 °C then Overnight at 37 °C
Wash with 1X PBS twice. 1 mL, 1X PBS quick wash 1 mL, 1X PBS quick wash

Add the crosslinking mix to crosslink cDNAs with BS(PEG)9. Prepare 5mM BS(PEG)9 in PBS. A B 1 component x1 volume (uL) 2 250mM BS(PEG)9 10 3 10X PBS 50 4 ultrapure water 440 Crosslink cDNA with BS(PEG)9 500 µL, 5 mM BS(PEG)9 in PBS for 01:00:00 at Room temperature Wash with PBS twice 1 mL, 1X PBS quick wash 1 mL, 1X PBS quick wash Quench unreacted crosslinker with 1M Tris, pH 8.0 1 mL, 1M Tris pH8.0 for 00:30:00 at Room temperature Wash with PBS twice 1 mL, 1X PBS quick wash 1 mL, 1X PBS quick wash

Prepare RNase Digestion Mix A B 1 component x1 volume (uL) 2 ultrapure water 168 3 10X RNase H buffer 20 4 RNase H (5U/uL) 10 5 RNase Cocktail 2 Add 200 µL, RNase Digestion Mix Incubate at 37 °C for 01:00:00 . Cover the silicone wells.
Wash samples with 1X PBS twice. 1 mL, 1X PBS quick wash 1 mL, 1X PBS quick wash

Prepare the 484-gene-Hybridization Mix according to the table below. Preheat the probe-water mix to 85 °C for 00:03:00 and immediately move them to a cold block or on ice. Then complete the Hybridization Mix. 484-gene-Hybridization Mix A B 1 component x1 volume (uL) 2 ultrapure water 98.2 3 10X Ampligase buffer 15 4 HB_Feb2022 probes ( 27.2 ng/uL) 25.3 5 100nM PLP1 oligos 1.5 6 Ampligase (5U/uL) 10 add 150 µL, 484-gene-Hybridization mix to human section

Incubate samples in the Hybridization Mix at 37 °C for 00:30:00 , then at 55 °C Overnight . For the overnight incubation, first set the Ez hyb oven to 60 °C and then change it to 55 °C as you put the samples in. Cover the sample well.

Prepare RCA Primer Mix A B 1 component x1 volume (uL) 2 ultrapure water 119 3 20X SSC 20 4 formamide 60 5 100 uM FISSEQ_ppRCA primer 1 add 200 µL, RCA Primer Mix to each sample and incubate at 37 °C for 01:00:00
Wash samples with 2xSSC. 1 mL, 2X SSC quick wash 1 mL, 2X SSC quick wash

Prepare RCA Enzyme Mix on ice. A B 1 component x1 volume (uL) 2 ultrapure water 119.25 3 10X Phi29 polymerase buffer 15 4 10mM dNTP 3.75 5 4mM aminoallyl-dUTP 1.5 6 NEB BSA (20mg/mL) 7.5 7 ThermoFisher Phi29 polymerase 3 8 total 150 Add 150 µL, RCA Enzyme Mix to each sample Incubate samples in RCA Enzyme Mix at 30 °C for 05:00:00
Wash samples with 1x PBS twice. 1 mL, 1X PBS quick wash 1 mL, 1X PBS quick wash
Wash samples with 1x PBS twice. 1 mL, 1X PBS quick wash 1 mL, 1X PBS quick wash

Crosslink with Acryloyl-X Mix and embed the sample in gel. Prepare Acryloyl-X Mix A B 1 Component x1 volume (uL) 2 10X PBS 50 3 10mg/mL Acryloyl-X, SE in DMSO 10 4 ultrapure water 440 add 500 µL, Acryloyl-X Mix to the sample and incubate for 00:30:00 at Room temperature quick wash with 1xPBS. 1 mL, 1X PBS quick wash Incubate the sample with 300 µL, Acrylamide Solution for 00:30:00 at Room temperature . Prepare Acrylamide Solution. A B 1 Component x1 volume (uL) 2 10X PBS 50 3 40% Acrylamide/Bis (37:1) 50 4 ultrapure water 400 Aspirate the Acrylamide Solution. Do not wash the samples!!! Prepare Polymerization Mix. Prepare 5% TEMED: 5 µL, TEMED in 95 µL, ultrapure water Prepare 4% APS: 10 mg, Ammonium Persulfate in 250 µL, ultrapure water RNaseZap and UV 18mm coverslips and treat them with Gel-Slick. A B 1 component x1 volume (uL) 2 Acrylamide solution 138 3 4% APS 6 4 5% TEMED 6 Add 30 µL, Polymerization Mix to the sample and cover with Gel-Slick-treated coverslip for 00:30:00 at Room temperature in an Argon tank. wash with 1x PBST for 3min twice 1 mL, 1X PBST for 00:03:00 1 mL, 1X PBST for 00:03:00 Carefully remove the Gel-Slick-treated coverslip on the samples wash with 1xPBST for 3min twice 1 mL, 1X PBST for 00:03:00 1 mL, 1X PBST for 00:03:00

stain the sample with Probe Hybridization Mix with decoding probes (Take dcProbe0_AF488, dcProbe0_Cy3, dcProbe0_ATTO647N probes as an example). Prepare Probe Hybridization Mix A B 1 component x1 volume (uL) 2 100 uM dcProbe0_AF488 1 3 100 uM dcProbe0_Cy3 1 4 100 uM dcProbe0_ATTO647 1 5 100% formamide 60 6 20X SSC 20 7 ultrapure water 117 add 200 µL, Probe Hybridization Mix to each sample. Incubate for 00:08:00 at Room temperature
Wash with10% formamide in 2X SSC twice. Then, image. 1 mL, 10% formamide in 2X SSC for 00:03:00 1 mL, 10% formamide in 2X SSC for 00:03:00

Strip with 1 mL, 80% formamide in 2X SSC for 00:05:00 . Wash with 1 mL, 2X SSC buffer once. Repeat the decoding imaging with the next decoding probes (dcProbe1, dcProbe2, dcProbe3, dcProbe4, dcProbe5, dcProbe6, and dcProbe7).
Wash twice with DEPC-1X PBS 1 mL, DEPC-1X PBS quick wash 1 mL, DEPC-1X PBS quick wash

Digest with 0.01% Pepsin in 0.1N HCl. Pre-warm the pepsin to 37 °C, for at least 5 minutes before use. 100 µL, 0.01% Pepsin in 0.1N HCl for 00:01:30 at Undetermined A B 1 component x1 volume (uL) 2 1% pepsin 1 3 0.1N HCl 99

After images of samples stained with dcProbe0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7 were taken, take the nuclei staining images with Draq5 staining. add 500 µL, Draq5 solution to the sample. Incubate for 00:05:00 at Room temperature wash the sample with 1x PBS twice. Then, image. 1 mL, 1X PBS for 00:02:00 1 mL, 1X PBS for 00:02:00
creator: Chien-Ju Chen
